headlines.title: Pemex Faces a Reckoning After Major Oil Spill
headlines.summary: Following a recent oil spill, Mexico’s state-owned oil firm Pemex has come under fire again, particularly due to its poor health and safety track record. headlines.title: Venezuela Oil Exports Hit Seven-Year High
headlines.summary: Venezuela’s oil exports rose to 1.23 million barrels per day (bpd) in April, the highest level since 2018, as shipments to the United States, India, and Europe accelerated.
